query:
INSERT INTO public.vocabulary_words (word, definition, example_sentence, part_of_speech, difficulty, exam_type)
VALUES
  ('Breaker', 'Something that breaks', 'Scholars noted a striking breaker between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Breech', 'The lower, rear trunk of the body', 'Her breech became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Brethren', 'Fellow members', 'Her brethren became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Brevity', 'Concise and exact use of words', 'The essay highlights the brevity of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bric-a-brac', 'Small ornaments, other miscellaneous items of little value', 'The essay highlights the bric-a-brac of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bridle', 'Part of the harness of a horse, consisting of bit and reins', 'The essay highlights the bridle of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Brigade', 'To form troops into a brigade', 'The author hoped the new policy would brigade tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Brigadier', 'An army rank, an officer commanding a brigade', 'The essay highlights the brigadier of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Brigand', 'An outlaw or bandit', 'Her brigand became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Brimstone', 'About or pertaining to hell', 'Critics argued that the plan might brimstone the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Brindl', 'Of a brownish, tawny or gray colour, with streaks or spots', 'Her brindl became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Brine', 'To preserve food in a salt solution', 'The author hoped the new policy would brine tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bristle', 'To be on one''s guard or raise one''s defenses', 'The author hoped the new policy would bristle tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Britannia', 'The ancient Roman name for Great Britain', 'Her britannia became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Briticism', 'An idiom used in britain but not in other eng-speaking areas', 'Her briticism became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Brittle', 'Liable to break or snap easily under stress or pressure', 'Critics argued that the plan might brittle the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Broach', 'To mention or suggest for the first time', 'The author hoped the new policy would broach tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Broadcast', 'Transmit to a wide audience', 'Over time, the community learned to broadcast its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Brogan', 'A heavy working shoe, a brogue', 'Her brogan became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Brogue', 'To speak with an accent', 'Over time, the community learned to brogue its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Brokerage', 'A company whose business is to act as a broker', 'The author hoped the new policy would brokerage tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bromide', 'A binary compound of bromine and some other element', 'Scholars noted a striking bromide between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bromine', 'A non-metallic chemical element, one of the halogens', 'The essay highlights the bromine of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bronchitis', 'An inflammation of the bronchi of the lungs', 'Scholars noted a striking bronchitis between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bronchus', 'The primary branches of the trachea, leading into the lungs', 'Her bronchus became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Brooch', 'Women’s jewellery having a pin to be fixed to garments', 'Over time, the community learned to brooch its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Brotherhood', 'The state of being brothers or a brother', 'The essay highlights the brotherhood of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Brouhaha', 'A stir, a fuss or uproar', 'Her brouhaha became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Browbeat', 'To bully in an intimidating, bossy, or supercilious way', 'The author hoped the new policy would browbeat tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Browse', 'To casually look through in order to find items of interest', 'The author hoped the new policy would browse tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bruit', 'To spread, promulgate or disseminate a rumour, news etc', 'Over time, the community learned to bruit its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Brunt', 'The chief consequences or negative results of something', 'Scholars noted a striking brunt between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Brusque', 'Abrupt or blunt in manner', 'The passage presents a brusque portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bucolic', 'Relating to pleasant aspects of the countryside', 'What seemed bucolic at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Buffet', 'A blow, typically with the hand or fist', 'Scholars noted a striking buffet between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Buffoon', 'To behave like a buffoon', 'Critics argued that the plan might buffoon the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bulbous', 'Having the shape of or resembling a bulb, bloated', 'The reviewer described the tone as bulbous, which shaped how readers interpreted the claim.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bullion', 'A bulk quantity of precious metal, usually gold or silver', 'The essay highlights the bullion of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bullock', 'A castrated bull', 'Her bullock became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bulrush', 'Any of several wetland herbs', 'Her bulrush became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bulwark', 'To fortify something with a wall or rampart', 'Critics argued that the plan might bulwark the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bumptious', 'Obtrusively pushy, self-assertive to a pretentious extreme', 'Over time, the community learned to bumptious its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bungalow', 'A small house or cottage usually having a single story', 'Her bungalow became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bungle', 'To botch up, bumble or incompetently perform a task', 'Critics argued that the plan might bungle the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Buoyant', 'Having buoyancy, able to float', 'Critics argued that the plan might buoyant the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bureau', 'Office', 'Scholars noted a striking bureau between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Bureaucracy', 'Structure and regulations in place to control activity', 'The author hoped the new policy would bureaucracy tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Burgeon', 'To begin to grow or increase rapidly', 'The author hoped the new policy would burgeon tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Burgess', 'An inhabitant of a borough with full rights, a citizen', 'Her burgess became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Burgher', 'A citizen, especially one belonging to middle class', 'Critics argued that the plan might burgher the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type)
ON CONFLICT (word, exam_type) DO UPDATE SET
  definition = EXCLUDED.definition,
  example_sentence = EXCLUDED.example_sentence,
  part_of_speech = EXCLUDED.part_of_speech,
  difficulty = EXCLUDED.difficulty;
